Deprecated API

Contents

  • Classes
  • Fields
  • Methods
  • Constructors
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    org.moeaframework.algorithm.Checkpoints
    Use CheckpointExtension instead
    org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation.AdaptiveTimeContinuation
    Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension instead
    org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation.EpsilonProgressContinuation
    Use EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension instead
    org.moeaframework.analysis.collector.AdaptiveTimeContinuationCollector
    Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtensionCollector instead
    org.moeaframework.core.PeriodicAction
    Use PeriodicExtension instead
    org.moeaframework.util.distributed.DistributedProblem
    Moved to DistributedProblem
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    org.moeaframework.core.Settings.KEY_EXTERNAL_PROBLEM_DEBUGGING_DEPRECATED
    Use Settings.KEY_EXTERNAL_PROBLEM_DEBUGGING instead
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    org.moeaframework.problem.ExternalProblem.setDebugStream(OutputStream)
    Enable debugging by calling ExternalProblem.Builder.withDebugging()
    org.moeaframework.util.format.TabularData.saveCSV(File)
    Use TabularData.save(TableFormat, File) instead
    org.moeaframework.util.TypedProperties.withProperty(String, String)
    use TypedProperties.of(String, String) instead
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    org.moeaframework.core.indicator.Normalizer(Problem, double[], double[])
    Use Normalizer(double[], double[]) instead
    org.moeaframework.core.indicator.Normalizer(Problem, Population)
    Use Normalizer(Population) instead
    org.moeaframework.core.indicator.Normalizer(Problem, Population, double)
    Use Normalizer(Population, double) instead
    org.moeaframework.core.indicator.Normalizer(Problem, Population, double[])
    Use Normalizer(Population, double[]) instead
    org.moeaframework.problem.ExternalProblem(InputStream, OutputStream)
    Use the ExternalProblem(Builder) constructor
    org.moeaframework.problem.ExternalProblem(Process)
    Use the ExternalProblem(Builder) constructor
    org.moeaframework.problem.ExternalProblem(String...)
    Use the ExternalProblem(Builder) constructor
    org.moeaframework.problem.ExternalProblem(String, int)
    Use the ExternalProblem(Builder) constructor
    org.moeaframework.problem.ExternalProblem(InetAddress, int)
    Use the ExternalProblem(Builder) constructor
